author: ebullient
description: Define card decks for activities, strategies, or any content you want to rotate through. Embed cards in your notes or browse them in a modal. Filter by tag hierarchies to narrow your selection. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ebullient
manifest.description: Define card decks for activities, strategies, or any content you want to rotate through. Embed cards in your notes or browse them in a modal. Filter by tag hierarchies to narrow your selection.
manifest.name: Deck Notes
